innehåll.punkt: Washing mashing can be found at hotel Cheyenne.
Magic hour is 08.30-09.30 when park is only open to Disneylands own hotel guests (= less people). It is important to been on time tought.
Security checks take place every time you enter Disney Village, which leads to the parks.
There is only a supermarket in the Val d’Europe shopping centre, which is one train station away. You can also order groceries to your hotel via UberEats.
Medicines are only sold in pharmacies, the nearest of which is in Val d’Europe. In case of emergency, you can get help inside Disneyland, but we advise you to pack paracetamol etc.

As there is a risk of pickpockets, leave everything not necessary in the room. Also, bring everything important if you leave a stroller somewhere. NOTE! If you lock the stroller, you may only lock the wheels of the stroller, not attach it to anything.
